value:
Thank you for reaching out, and I'm sorry to hear your credit card has been stolen. However, I'm not able to manage credit card security or access—that's something your card issuer handles directly. Please contact your bank or credit card company right away (you can usually find the number on your statement or their website) to report the theft and have them deactivate the card immediately.

If you have any questions about charges related to our service, I'm happy to help with that once your card is secured. Stay safe!
